# fivenines_task (Resource)

Manages a FiveNines task (cron/heartbeat monitor).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fivenines_task" "backup_check" {
  name                 = "Nightly Backup"
  schedule_type        = "cron"
  schedule             = "0 2 * * *"
  time_zone            = "America/New_York"
  grace_period_minutes = 30
}

resource "fivenines_task" "heartbeat" {
  name                 = "App Heartbeat"
  schedule_type        = "interval"
  interval_seconds     = 300
  grace_period_minutes = 10
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the task.
- `schedule_type` (String) Schedule type: "cron" or "interval". Changing this forces recreation.

### Optional

- `grace_period_minutes` (Number) Grace period in minutes before marking as missed.
- `host_id` (String) Optional host ID to associate this task with.
- `interval_seconds` (Number) Interval in seconds (required when schedule_type is interval).
- `paused` (Boolean) Whether the task is paused.
- `schedule` (String) Cron expression (required when schedule_type is cron).
- `time_zone` (String) Time zone for cron schedule.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `expected_ping_at` (String) Next expected ping time.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier (UUID).
- `last_ping_at` (String) Last ping received time.
- `monitoring_status` (String) Monitoring status.
- `ping_key` (String, Sensitive) Ping key for sending heartbeats.
- `ping_url` (String) URL to send heartbeat pings to.
- `status` (String) Current status.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
